ValidationRule.description: Translations sheet must be completed before moving to Completed - SIT Ready
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Completed - SIT Ready"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), Translations_Sheet_Complete__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Translations Sheet must be completed before moving to "Completed - SIT Ready". Please complete and tick the Translations Sheet Complete checkbox.
